CONTENT.Career: Chorý joined Viktoria Plzeň in the 2018 summer transfer window. He scored two goals in a 2022–23 UEFA Champions League group stage match against Barcelona. Chorý won his second title in the 2021–22 Czech First League on 15 May 2022. In April 2024, he signed a contract with Viktoria Plzeň until 2027.On 5 October 2020, Chorý went on loan to Belgian club SV Zulte-Waregem, scoring four goals at the 2020–21 Belgian First Division A.On 3 July 2024, Chorý signed a contract with Slavia Prague until 30 June 2027.
CONTENT.Personal life: Chorý is the son of former Czech footballer Martin Chorý.
CONTENT.External links: Tomáš Chorý at Fortunaliga.czTomáš Chorý – Czech First League statistics at Fotbal DNES (in Czech)Tomáš Chorý at FAČR (also at old FAČR website) (in Czech)Tomáš Chorý at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Chorý debuted for the Czech Republic senior team on 20 November 2023 in a UEFA Euro 2024 qualifying Group E match against Moldova.Scores and results list the Czech Republic's goal tally first.

SUMMARY: Tomáš Chorý (born 26 January 1995) is a Czech professional footballer who currently plays as a forward for Slavia Prague and the Czech Republic national team.
